description: Knowledge scenarios for listing-style image enhancement: expected policy outcomes aligned with prompt_templates (zero additions, spatial fidelity, fixture lock). Use for QA checklists, eval rubrics, and onboarding. v2 adds cross-industry scenarios (education, healthcare, industrial, transportation, hospitality ops) and intelligence-test-friendly edge cases. v3: pet-floor amenities + twin-shade lamp + dresser drawer-grid regression (real listing pair).

scenarios.title: Asymmetric bedside — single lamp
scenarios.setup: King bed with one nightstand and one table lamp; opposite bedside is empty floor/wall.
forbidden_model_behaviors: Add a second nightstand or twin lamp for symmetry
Move the existing lamp to the empty side
Place a floor lamp in the empty corner to balance composition
allowed_model_behaviors: Brighten via exposure and tone
Straighten verticals; mild perspective cleanup
Listing reframe (front/side/center) without moving furniture

scenarios.title: Bedroom with bathroom doorway on side wall
scenarios.setup: Bed hero with visible en-suite or hall bath opening showing tile or light beyond.
forbidden_model_behaviors: Seal the doorway with headboard wall or built-ins
Replace opening with a window or artwork
Slide the bed to cover the doorway for a cleaner hero
allowed_model_behaviors: Reframe so doorway remains visible per listing angle
Recover highlight detail in bright bathroom without removing the opening

scenarios.title: Empty strip between bath door and TV dresser
scenarios.setup: Doorway to bath, then bare wall/floor, then dresser with TV.
forbidden_model_behaviors: Insert a console table, credenza, or plant in the gap
Add a bench or luggage rack in the empty floor zone
allowed_model_behaviors: Widen crop revealing more bare wall/floor matching paint and flooring
Color and exposure consistency across the gap

scenarios.title: Desk on one side of bed, nightstand on the other
scenarios.setup: Mixed bedside functions common in extended-stay rooms.
forbidden_model_behaviors: Replace desk with a second nightstand to match the other side
Mirror the desk to the opposite wall
Add a task lamp on the desk if none exists in source
allowed_model_behaviors: Sharpen wood grain on desk; white balance for lamp and screen glow
Center-angle crop that keeps both sides readable

scenarios.title: Glass shower partial reflection
scenarios.setup: Vanity, mirror, glass enclosure; reflections show adjacent bedroom or hall.
forbidden_model_behaviors: Paint out reflection to invent a different room
Add towel stacks or spa props not on surfaces in source
Change fixture count (sconces, pendants)
allowed_model_behaviors: Denoise tiles; correct WB; reduce glare on glass
Straighten vertical tile lines

scenarios.title: Lobby with asymmetric sofa groups
scenarios.setup: Multiple seating islands; pathways to front desk and elevators.
forbidden_model_behaviors: Clone a sofa to fill dead space
Add potted trees or dividers not in photo
Relocate chairs to fake symmetry around a rug
allowed_model_behaviors: Even exposure across deep space; lift shadows under furniture
Perspective correction for tall atrium lines

scenarios.title: Hotel restaurant dining room
scenarios.setup: Tables, chairs, place settings, existing centerpieces only as photographed.
forbidden_model_behaviors: Add plates, wine glasses, or cutlery on empty tables
Insert people dining
Change chair count or move tables to clear aisles
allowed_model_behaviors: Warm lighting preset on existing fixtures only
Sharpen wood and fabric textures

scenarios.title: Pool deck with partial lounger row
scenarios.setup: Water line, deck, some loungers; open deck space.
forbidden_model_behaviors: Duplicate loungers to fill deck
Add umbrellas or cabanas not in frame
Move loungers into perfect grid
allowed_model_behaviors: HDR-style balance between sky and water
Remove sensor dust spots; sharpen deck texture

scenarios.title: Building facade oblique angle
scenarios.setup: Street-level or podium view; signage may be partial.
forbidden_model_behaviors: Add floors, wings, or balconies
Invent a different brand sign or rewrite lettering
Drop in cars or pedestrians not present
allowed_model_behaviors: Verticals and horizon correction
Sky recovery without replacing the building silhouette

scenarios.title: Studio combined living and sleep zone
scenarios.setup: Sofa bed or murphy; small kitchenette edge in frame.
forbidden_model_behaviors: Remove kitchenette to look like pure bedroom
Add room divider furniture not in source
Relocate sofa to window wall
allowed_model_behaviors: Bright, even exposure for small space
Side-angle depth emphasis without new objects

scenarios.title: Narrow galley kitchen
scenarios.setup: Counters, appliances, upper cabinets; possibly one pendant.
forbidden_model_behaviors: Add pendant lights or under-cabinet strips not visible
Put fruit bowls or appliances on empty counter
Change appliance positions or swap fridge door hinge side
allowed_model_behaviors: WB correction under mixed LED and daylight
Specular highlight control on counters

scenarios.title: Balcony slab and railing
scenarios.setup: Sliding door reveal; railing; city or courtyard beyond.
forbidden_model_behaviors: Add outdoor furniture on empty balcony
Change railing style or glass panels
Replace real skyline with stock cityscape
allowed_model_behaviors: Lift shadows on balcony floor; sharpen railing mesh
Corner outpaint only for architecture continuation

scenarios.title: Lightly staged living — negative space on rug
scenarios.setup: Sofa, coffee table, large bare rug area.
forbidden_model_behaviors: Add armchairs, ottomans, or floor lamps in empty rug
Hang art on blank walls not dressed in source
Move sofa to center the room differently
allowed_model_behaviors: Bright natural preset; sharpen flooring and textile
Front or center angle reframe on existing layout

scenarios.title: Vacant room — only flooring and shells
scenarios.setup: No furniture; outlets, baseboards, windows.
forbidden_model_behaviors: Stage with virtual furniture
Add area rug or plants
Close off closet opening with wall
allowed_model_behaviors: Exposure and color to sell cleanliness
Verticals straight; window view balanced

scenarios.title: Open plan kitchen to dining
scenarios.setup: Island, dining table partial; sightlines to living.
forbidden_model_behaviors: Remove island or change footprint
Add pendant trio when only one exists
Slide dining table toward camera for symmetry
allowed_model_behaviors: Consistent WB across zones
Wide side-angle depth read

scenarios.title: Retail shell or showroom
scenarios.setup: Open floor, columns, ceiling grid.
forbidden_model_behaviors: Add shelving units or kiosks
Change column count or ceiling tile pattern
Paint branding murals not in source
allowed_model_behaviors: Even illumination; reduce color cast from fluorescents
Perspective correction

scenarios.title: Set table with visible menu card
scenarios.setup: Glassware and silver as photographed; printed menu or QR tent.
forbidden_model_behaviors: Rewrite prices or dish names on menu
Add wine bottle not in shot
Clone place settings to empty seats
allowed_model_behaviors: Warm evening mood using existing lights only
Sharpen text edges without changing copy

scenarios.title: Back bar with bottle rows
scenarios.setup: Shelves, labels partially readable, taps.
forbidden_model_behaviors: Invent premium bottle labels not in source
Add tap handles or neon signs
Rearrange bottle order for color gradient
allowed_model_behaviors: HDR between backlit bottles and bar top
Denoise without smearing labels

scenarios.title: Outdoor patio seating
scenarios.setup: Existing string lights, tables, chairs as shot.
forbidden_model_behaviors: Add string light strands beyond what is visible
Insert heaters or planters
Move tables to fake social spacing
allowed_model_behaviors: Blue hour sky with warm existing bulbs
Sharpen pavement and chair mesh

scenarios.title: Overhead hero of single plate
scenarios.setup: One main plate, crumbs and sauce as captured.
forbidden_model_behaviors: Add garnish, sesame seeds, or drizzle
Duplicate partial second plate from mirror
Replace protein with different ingredient
allowed_model_behaviors: Sharpen texture; lift shadows in bowl
Color accuracy for food tones

scenarios.title: Flat lay with intentional negative space
scenarios.setup: Corner of board, one utensil, napkin edge.
forbidden_model_behaviors: Fill negative space with extra props
Add second dish or drink
Rotate utensils to perfect parallel grid if that moves them
allowed_model_behaviors: Clean background noise; even tabletop color
Slight rotation of entire frame only (whole-image)

scenarios.title: Cold drink with condensation
scenarios.setup: Single glass; straw or citrus only if present.
forbidden_model_behaviors: Add second glass or bottle
Change logo on glass or coaster
Insert ice cubes that alter drink identity
allowed_model_behaviors: Highlight recovery on glass; crisp droplets
White balance for liquid and ice tones without altering cup or branding geometry

scenarios.title: Spa room with massage table
scenarios.setup: Table, minimal cart, towels as shown.
forbidden_model_behaviors: Add aromatherapy diffusers or plants
Second table or stool not in source
Move cart to opposite wall
allowed_model_behaviors: Calm warm lighting from existing sources
Clean linen whites

scenarios.title: Conference room with blank screen
scenarios.setup: Table, chairs, display off or black.
forbidden_model_behaviors: Burn in fake slide content or logos
Add chairs to head of table
Remove visible cable trays or outlets
allowed_model_behaviors: Even room lights; reduce glare on screen glass
Straighten verticals

scenarios.title: Clothing rack with sparse hangers
scenarios.setup: Some empty rail; visible inventory as shot.
forbidden_model_behaviors: Duplicate garments to fill rack
Change garment colors or patterns
Add mannequin not in store
allowed_model_behaviors: Color accurate textiles; reduce hanger shine
Perspective correction for rack lines

scenarios.title: Ballroom setup — some tables empty
scenarios.setup: Mix of dressed and undressed rounds.
forbidden_model_behaviors: Copy centerpieces to bare tables
Add chairs to meet capacity
Change ceiling rig or drapery
allowed_model_behaviors: Even exposure for cavernous space
Noise reduction in shadows

scenarios.title: White triangular voids after perspective correction
scenarios.setup: Listing angle pipeline produced edge voids.
forbidden_model_behaviors: Clone bed or sofa into void
Place lamp or art in wedge
Relocate real furniture while filling
allowed_model_behaviors: Extend wall paint, baseboard, ceiling line, floor grain
Match lighting direction from adjacent pixels

scenarios.title: Side angle — bath door must stay on correct side of depth
scenarios.setup: End-of-room vantage; bathroom opening on viewer right in source.
forbidden_model_behaviors: Jump camera to opposite narrow end
Mirror room so bath flips sides
Seal bath opening for cleaner far wall
allowed_model_behaviors: Lengthwise depth with plumb verticals
Widen crop while preserving openings

scenarios.title: Agent or guest visible at edge of frame
scenarios.setup: Partial person in mirror or doorway.
forbidden_model_behaviors: Remove person if they are part of truthful capture policy
Add models walking through scene
Change clothing to stage lifestyle
allowed_model_behaviors: Photographic cleanup only per product policy
Privacy blur if product explicitly supports it

scenarios.title: Adjoining suite — pair of connecting doors
scenarios.setup: Two door leaves or vestibule between rooms; sightline into second sleeping zone.
forbidden_model_behaviors: Remove one door to simplify the wall plane
Seal the connecting opening to look like a single room
Replace the opening with a window or artwork
allowed_model_behaviors: White balance across both rooms; consistent exposure
Vertical alignment of door jambs; mild perspective cleanup
Listing reframe that keeps both openings readable

scenarios.title: Breakfast buffet — some chafing stations empty
scenarios.setup: Row of heated trays; a few positions have no pans as photographed.
forbidden_model_behaviors: Duplicate chafing dishes or food from adjacent trays into empty slots
Add steam or food not present in the source
Rearrange the buffet line to fake fullness
allowed_model_behaviors: Even overhead lighting using existing fixtures only
Sharpen table linens and sneeze guard edges
Color accuracy for fruit and pastries that are visible

scenarios.title: In-unit laundry closet — bifold doors folded back
scenarios.setup: Washer-dryer stack; bare side wall; hall or kitchen edge visible.
forbidden_model_behaviors: Close the closet into flush panels if the source shows it open
Add shelving or baskets on empty wall not in photo
Slide appliances to center them in frame
allowed_model_behaviors: Lift shadow detail inside closet cavity
Reduce glare on appliance fascias
Straighten verticals on door tracks

scenarios.title: Residential garage — bare concrete and tracks
scenarios.setup: Overhead door hardware, slab, maybe one outlet; no vehicles.
forbidden_model_behaviors: Virtually stage with tool benches or storage systems
Paint over stains to imply new slab
Add vehicles or bikes not in capture
allowed_model_behaviors: Exposure to show ceiling height and door mechanism clearly
Denoise shadow corners; correct WB under mixed lighting

scenarios.title: Roof deck with partial pergola coverage
scenarios.setup: Deck boards, railing, city roof deck beyond; some slats cast shadow.
forbidden_model_behaviors: Extend pergola structure beyond what is in frame
Add lounge furniture on empty deck
Replace real skyline with stock cityscape
allowed_model_behaviors: Balance sky and deck exposure
Sharpen railing cables and wood grain

scenarios.title: Open kitchen pass with plated tickets
scenarios.setup: Metal shelf, plates in rack, partial view of line cooks.
forbidden_model_behaviors: Add finished plates in empty rack slots
Insert steam or motion blur to imply activity
Move the pass shelf closer to camera
allowed_model_behaviors: Recover highlight on stainless; denoise shadow under shelf
White balance for warm line lights only as present

scenarios.title: Packaged retail product — nutrition panel legible
scenarios.setup: Single SKU on counter; small type on label visible.
forbidden_model_behaviors: Rewrite nutrition facts or ingredients
Swap logo or brand marks
Add a second SKU to imply variety pack
allowed_model_behaviors: Sharpen micro-type without changing characters
Even lighting on label; reduce plastic wrap glare

scenarios.title: Lecture hall — alternating empty seats
scenarios.setup: Fixed seating tiers; pattern of occupied vs empty as shot.
forbidden_model_behaviors: Clone occupants into empty seats
Remove people to fake an empty room
Shift arm desks to align rows perfectly
allowed_model_behaviors: Even exposure across raked seating
Straighten verticals on side walls
Noise reduction in shadow under seats

scenarios.title: Clinic waiting — modular chairs with gaps
scenarios.setup: Vinyl chairs in clusters; clear floor between groups.
forbidden_model_behaviors: Add magazine tables in empty gaps
Duplicate chair modules to fill floor
Replace wayfinding signage text
allowed_model_behaviors: Bright, clinical white balance
Clean floor shine without adding objects
Perspective correction for dropped ceiling grid

scenarios.title: Warehouse aisle — sparse pallet positions
scenarios.setup: Pallet racking; some bays empty; forklift partial at end.
forbidden_model_behaviors: Clone pallets or boxes into empty bays
Add safety cones or striping not in source
Change rack height or bay count
allowed_model_behaviors: Lift shadow under racking; even fluorescent color
Sharpen mesh back panels

scenarios.title: Transit gate hold room — seating bank with voids
scenarios.setup: Fixed benches; passengers sparse; signage high on wall.
forbidden_model_behaviors: Add travelers on empty bench sections
Change gate number or airline text on monitors
Insert vending machines in blank wall zones
allowed_model_behaviors: Recover detail in backlit screens without rewriting content
Denoise ceiling; sharpen floor tile joints

scenarios.title: Back-of-house corridor — single housekeeping cart
scenarios.setup: Narrow service hall; one cart; fire door propped as shown.
forbidden_model_behaviors: Duplicate cart to imply staffing level
Seal fire door opening if visible
Add wall-mounted dispensers not in photo
allowed_model_behaviors: Linear perspective down hall; vertical door frames
Neutral WB under utilitarian LEDs

scenarios.title: Club lounge — L-shaped sectional with one floor lamp
scenarios.setup: Large sectional; single arc lamp; open negative space on rug.
forbidden_model_behaviors: Add a second floor lamp for symmetry
Insert coffee tables in bare rug area
Mirror the sectional to complete an imaginary U-shape
allowed_model_behaviors: Warm preset on existing lamp glow only
Sharpen textile weave and wood side table
Listing center or side angle without moving seating

scenarios.title: Grocery aisle — facing gaps on shelf facings
scenarios.setup: Some shelf slots empty; price tags visible; LED cooler glow.
forbidden_model_behaviors: Clone product facings into empty slots
Change unit prices or promo text on tags
Add endcap displays not in frame
allowed_model_behaviors: Color-accurate packaging on stocked rows
Reduce cooler banding; sharpen tag edges without OCR edits

scenarios.title: Ballroom ceremony — floral arch half dressed
scenarios.setup: Pipe-and-drape; arch frame; partial florals as captured.
forbidden_model_behaviors: Complete the arch with invented blooms
Add aisle chairs beyond what is visible
Change drapery color swatches
allowed_model_behaviors: Even exposure for mixed tungsten and daylight
Sharpen fabric pleats on existing drape only

scenarios.title: Twin beds — do not merge into one king
scenarios.setup: Two twins with shared nightstand or gap; asymmetric lamp count possible.
forbidden_model_behaviors: Merge twin mattresses into one king visual
Remove one bed to declutter
Add matching lamps on both sides if only one exists in source
allowed_model_behaviors: Bright linens; correct WB
Front angle with horizontal hero center without inventing symmetry

scenarios.title: Low-light capture — heavy ISO noise
scenarios.setup: Underexposed bedroom; visible chroma noise in shadows; tripod shake absent.
forbidden_model_behaviors: Hallucinate new furniture when denoising shadow regions
Brighten by painting in lamps not in the photograph
Remove doorway dark rectangles that are real openings
allowed_model_behaviors: Denoise while preserving texture on known bedding
Lift exposure globally without relocating objects

scenarios.title: Listing output must stay full-bleed photograph
scenarios.setup: Any interior suitable for OTA thumbnail; model might add stylized edges.
forbidden_model_behaviors: Add letterboxing, faux matting, or gallery frame
Add watermark, logo bug, or corner branding
Crop to polaroid-style white borders
allowed_model_behaviors: Standard photographic enhancement within full frame
Perspective and exposure correction to rectangular photo edges

scenarios.title: Phone booth pods — one door open
scenarios.setup: Glass pods; one ajar showing interior stool; others closed.
forbidden_model_behaviors: Close the open pod to look uniform
Add laptops or monitors inside visible pod
Clone pod skin to hide an empty slot
allowed_model_behaviors: Reduce reflections on glass; keep readable interior depth
Straighten ceiling baffles

scenarios.title: Living room — stacked slider partially open
scenarios.setup: Track visible; one panel open to balcony; shear drape as shot.
forbidden_model_behaviors: Close the slider to simplify composition
Add balcony furniture beyond glass
Replace real view with stock ocean
allowed_model_behaviors: HDR between interior and exterior exposure
Sharpen frame profiles and handle hardware

scenarios.title: Pizza line — peel resting on pass ledge
scenarios.setup: Marble pass; peel; maybe one boxed pie edge; oven mouth visible.
forbidden_model_behaviors: Add pizzas or toppings not in frame
Move peel to a 'hero' angle that changes its real position
Insert steam from oven if not in capture
allowed_model_behaviors: Sharpen stone and metal; WB for oven glow
Recover shadow under pass without new props

scenarios.title: Wall-mounted TV off — black glass rectangle
scenarios.setup: Bracket visible; screen black; no HDMI splash in source.
forbidden_model_behaviors: Burn in channel guide or hotel brand splash
Remove the TV to fake minimalism
Add soundbar not mounted in photo
allowed_model_behaviors: Control specular rectangle on glass
Keep bezel and bracket geometry unchanged

scenarios.title: Interior stairwell — landing window and handrail
scenarios.setup: Open risers or closed; window on landing; door under stair possible.
forbidden_model_behaviors: Remove understair door to open storage visually
Change baluster count or spacing
Replace window view with fake landscape
allowed_model_behaviors: Straighten handrail line; vertical newel post
Balance interior with window exposure

scenarios.title: Fitness floor — cardio row with empty mats
scenarios.setup: Treadmills; open floor markers; mirror wall behind.
forbidden_model_behaviors: Duplicate machines into empty mat bays
Add dumbbell racks in clear zones
Replace mirror reflection with stock gym crowd
allowed_model_behaviors: Even fluorescents; sharpen belt texture on visible units
Reduce mirror glare without inventing reflection content

scenarios.title: Salon stations — mirrors and chairs staggered
scenarios.setup: Some stations dark; product bottles sparse on ledge.
forbidden_model_behaviors: Clone product bottles to fill ledges
Add ring lights not visible in source
Invent client reflections in empty chairs
allowed_model_behaviors: Sharpen mirror edges; WB for mixed sources
Denoise shadow under styling chair

scenarios.title: Library study zone — alternating carrel occupancy
scenarios.setup: Wood carrels with task lights; some seats empty; stacks visible at aisle end.
forbidden_model_behaviors: Add laptops or books on empty carrels
Turn on task lamps that are off in the photograph
Remove fire-exit signage to clean the wall
allowed_model_behaviors: Even exposure along reading aisle; denoise shadow under shelves
Straighten verticals on stack ends and window mullions

scenarios.title: Exam room — instrument tray partial
scenarios.setup: Paper roll, sink, wall-mounted diagnostics; tray with few tools as shot.
forbidden_model_behaviors: Populate tray with scalpels or syringes not in source
Add wall charts with legible fake PHI
Relocate exam table toward window
allowed_model_behaviors: Clinical white balance; lift shadow under table
Sharpen stainless sink without new reflections of invented objects

scenarios.title: Loading dock — one bay door open
scenarios.setup: Concrete apron; bumper pads; interior darkness beyond one opening.
forbidden_model_behaviors: Park a truck or forklift in empty bay
Change number of dock levelers
Brick over an adjacent open bay to simplify composition
allowed_model_behaviors: Recover detail inside dark bay without adding vehicles
Straighten vertical dock door frames

scenarios.title: Airport concourse — moving walkway edge
scenarios.setup: Rubber belt; glass balustrade; distant gate signage small in frame.
forbidden_model_behaviors: Rewrite gate numbers or airline names on distant signs
Add travelers on empty belt sections
Insert ad posters on blank wall panels
allowed_model_behaviors: Sharpen balustrade lines; reduce glare on glass
Denoise ceiling baffles under mixed CCT

scenarios.title: Banquet kitchen — double swing doors ajar
scenarios.setup: Stainless threshold; glimpse of service corridor; carts partial.
forbidden_model_behaviors: Close doors that are open in source
Duplicate chafing stacks visible through opening
Add staff in corridor not photographed
allowed_model_behaviors: WB for fluorescent and warm spill from event space
Sharpen door hardware and kick plates

scenarios.title: Pet-friendly double queen — bowls on mat and dual-shade bedside lamp
scenarios.setup: Two queens share one nightstand; one lamp with two rectangular white shades on a single base; blue silicone mat with red and blue pet bowls on the floor by the dresser; small trash can near the hall opening; three-drawer dresser with TV.
forbidden_model_behaviors: Remove or paint out the pet mat and bowls as clutter
Collapse the two rectangular lamp shades into one bell or tapered shade
Redraw the dresser as a six-drawer or two-column front if the source is a three-drawer unit
Remove the trash can to clean the corner
Swap pillow counts or bed skirts to fake a different housekeeping standard
allowed_model_behaviors: Brighten via exposure and tone using the existing lamp glow only
Sharpen headboard wood, bedding texture, and floor planks
Keep every bowl, mat, and casegood silhouette pixel-consistent with the source
